hero.title: Garden Quest Wiki
hero.description: Garden Quest is an upcoming Roblox farming adventure where players prepare for seeds, quests, pets, fishing, gear, and garden progression. This wiki tracks official links, launch news, codes, and beginner routes as details are confirmed.

gameFeature.title: Garden Quest Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Garden Quest is an upcoming Roblox farming adventure built around planting seeds, growing crops, raising pets, fishing, visiting the gear shop, and decorating your garden plot.

gardenQuestReleaseAndPlayLink.title: Garden Quest Release Date and Official Play Links
gardenQuestReleaseAndPlayLink.intro: Garden Quest is a Roblox farming game from Garden Quest Studio. Start from the official Roblox community, then follow the studio's YouTube and Discord for launch updates, trailers, codes, and playable links.

items.label: Release Date
items.description: The Garden Quest official trailer lists the release timing as June 27 on Roblox.

items.label: Official Roblox Community
items.description: Use community ID 124192767 as the official Roblox starting point for Garden Quest.

items.label: Official YouTube Channel
items.description: The Garden Quest Studio channel posts trailers, shorts, and gameplay previews.

items.label: Official Discord
items.description: The Garden Quest Discord is the main hub for announcements, code drops, and launch notices.

items.label: Official Trailer
items.description: The trailer presents Garden Quest gameplay and release-date information in one source.

gardenQuestCodes.title: Garden Quest Codes
gardenQuestCodes.intro: Garden Quest code tracking starts with the official Discord, Garden Quest Studio YouTube channel, official trailer, and Roblox community. Codes are copied exactly as posted by official sources.

sections.heading: Code Use Rules
tips: Copy Garden Quest codes exactly as posted by official sources.
Check spacing, capitalization, and punctuation before redeeming.
Use the official Roblox community and Discord before trusting any reposted code list.

gardenQuestBeginnerGuide.title: Garden Quest Beginner Guide
gardenQuestBeginnerGuide.intro: Garden Quest is built around a garden-starting loop: enter through the official Roblox path, follow launch announcements, plant seeds, grow crops, and learn the first systems shown in official previews.

steps.title: Start From the Official Roblox Community
steps.description: Open the Garden Quest Roblox community first and use the official community path for launch access.

steps.title: Join the Garden Quest Discord
steps.description: Use the Discord invite to follow launch announcements, code drops, and community notices before entering the game.

steps.title: Watch the Official Trailer
steps.description: The trailer shows Garden Quest gameplay and release timing, making it the best first preview before launch.

steps.title: Follow Garden Quest Studio Shorts
steps.description: Official shorts show early gameplay previews, including Garden Quest seed-planting clips.

steps.title: Plant Your First Seeds
steps.description: Seed planting appears in Garden Quest previews, including a turnip seed planting clip that previews the farming loop.

steps.title: Build Around the Garden Loop
steps.description: Focus the first session on planting, growing, checking crop progress, and learning where Garden Quest places core garden tools and menus.

quickTips: Enter Garden Quest through the official Roblox community, not random game links.
Follow the official Discord and YouTube so launch codes and updates reach you first.
Start with crops shown in official previews, like turnip, before experimenting.
Keep your first session simple: plant, water, harvest, and learn the menus.

gardenQuestSeedsAndCrops.title: Garden Quest Seeds and Crops Tier List
gardenQuestSeedsAndCrops.intro: Garden Quest seed tracking begins with previewed crops and expands as players collect live crop stats. Turnip is the first highlighted crop because it appears in a Garden Quest planting preview.

tiers.label: Shown in Garden Quest Footage
tiers.description: Crops in this tier appear in Garden Quest preview content and should be tracked first at launch.

crops.name: Turnip
crops.use: Early crop tracking and starter garden setup

tiers.label: Tier List Criteria
tiers.description: Garden Quest crops should be ranked by practical value instead of guesswork.

crops.name: Fast Growth Crops
crops.use: Best for early money loops and quick garden expansion

crops.name: High Value Crops
crops.use: Best for long-term profit and upgrades

crops.name: Rare or Limited Crops
crops.preview: Track official update and event drops
crops.use: Best for collection value and event progress

gardenQuestPetsGuide.title: Garden Quest Pets Guide
gardenQuestPetsGuide.intro: Pets are equipable garden companions that support the Garden Quest farming loop and double as collection goals. Unicorn is the clearest confirmed pet so far: a Mythic pet whose info text shows it trotting around the garden and doubling the chance for plants and fruit to turn Rainbow.

items.name: Deer
items.detail: Shown in the active Garden Quest pet lineup beside Robin and Unicorn.
items.player_use: Track as an equipable pet slot for garden support and collection progress.

items.name: Robin
items.detail: Shown in the active Garden Quest pet lineup beside Deer and Unicorn.
items.player_use: Track as a pet-menu companion for collection and farm-support comparisons.

items.name: Unicorn
items.detail: Garden Quest pet info shows Unicorn trotting around the garden and doubling the chance for plants and fruit to turn Rainbow.
items.player_use: Use as the main mutation-value pet card when comparing pets that improve harvest outcomes.

items.name: 3/3 Pets Equipped
items.detail: Garden Quest preview footage shows a full 3/3 equipped pet state with Deer, Robin, and Unicorn.
items.player_use: Compare active pet slots by role so farming, collection, and mutation support stay easy to read.

gardenQuestFishingGuide.title: Garden Quest Fishing Guide
gardenQuestFishingGuide.intro: Fishing is a standalone Garden Quest system shown in official previews alongside pets. This guide keeps fishing separate from crop farming, pets, gear, and housing so players can find the pond-side loop quickly. It is structured around access, catches, rewards, and route notes.

items.question: What is the Garden Quest fishing system?
items.answer: Fishing is a standalone side activity shown in Garden Quest preview content, separate from planting crops and equipping pets. Use this section when you want the Garden Quest fishing loop without digging through pets, gear, or housing.

items.question: How does fishing connect with pets in Garden Quest?
items.answer: Fishing and pets are previewed together in the same Garden Quest content drop. Pets cover passive garden support, while fishing gives players another collection-and-reward activity beside crop farming.

items.question: What should Garden Quest players check first about fishing?
items.answer: Check Garden Quest fishing access, catch names, reward types, and route timing first. These are the details that matter most when deciding whether to fish, farm, sell, or shop next.

items.question: How are Garden Quest fishing rewards organized?
items.answer: Garden Quest fishing rewards are best organized by fish name, location, reward type, rarity, and best route. This keeps the guide useful for both collection players and players focused on efficient farming.

gardenQuestGearShopAndTools.title: Garden Quest Gear Shop and Tools Guide
gardenQuestGearShopAndTools.intro: The Gear Shop is a core utility system in Garden Quest, giving players a dedicated place to buy tools and spendable gear. This guide covers what each item does, how it supports farming or movement, and why it matters for early progression.

items.name: Gear Shop
items.detail: A dedicated Gear Shop is shown in Garden Quest preview content.
items.player_use: Use as the main hub for comparing Garden Quest tools, gear, prices, stock, and purchase priority.

items.name: Gear Shop Menu
items.detail: Garden Quest preview content presents the Gear Shop as a shop-facing system for gear items.
items.player_use: Check item name, category, effect, and price before buying.

items.name: Tools
items.detail: Garden Quest preview material frames tools as part of the gear and upgrade loop.
items.player_use: Separate farming-support tools from cosmetic decoration so players know what helps progress first.

items.name: Turnip Scooter
items.detail: A Turnip Scooter appears in Garden Quest preview content.
items.player_use: Track as movement gear for crossing the garden map and reducing travel time between Garden Quest systems.

gardenQuestHousesAndDecorations.title: Garden Quest Houses and Decorations Guide
gardenQuestHousesAndDecorations.intro: Houses and home decoration are a visible part of Garden Quest, giving players a cosmetic layer beside farming, pets, fishing, and gear. Decorations include lights, chairs, benches, paintings, statues, fountains, and food items, so players can plan home and garden style around confirmed categories.

items.name: Houses
items.placement_idea: Use as the anchor point for decorative layouts and Garden Quest garden identity.

items.name: Home and Decor Gameplay
items.placement_idea: Group decorations by function so housing, garden paths, and display areas stay readable.

items.name: Lights
items.placement_idea: Place around paths, home entrances, and display corners to make layouts easier to read.

items.name: Chairs and Benches
items.placement_idea: Use near houses, garden edges, and social areas to make the Garden Quest plot feel lived in.

items.name: Paintings and Statues
items.placement_idea: Use as focal-point decorations for house interiors, exterior walls, and showcase zones.

items.name: Fountains
items.placement_idea: Use as a central garden piece or as a decorative divider between farming and home areas.

items.name: Food Items
items.placement_idea: Use near home layouts or social areas when building cozy decorative scenes.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Garden Quest before launch.

questions.question: When does Garden Quest release on Roblox?
questions.answer: Garden Quest is scheduled to release on Roblox on June 27, 2026, according to the official Garden Quest trailer.

questions.question: Where can I play Garden Quest?
questions.answer: Garden Quest is a Roblox game. Use the official Garden Quest Roblox community (ID 124192767) as the safe starting point instead of random game links.

questions.question: Where do I find Garden Quest codes?
questions.answer: Garden Quest codes are announced on the official Garden Quest Discord, the Garden Quest Studio YouTube channel, and the official trailer. Always copy codes exactly as posted.

questions.question: What can I do in Garden Quest at launch?
questions.answer: Garden Quest is a farming adventure built around planting seeds, growing crops, raising pets, fishing, shopping for gear, and decorating your garden plot.

questions.question: Is Garden Quest free to play?
questions.answer: Garden Quest is a Roblox experience, so it follows Roblox's standard access model. Join through the official Garden Quest Roblox community to play.

questions.question: How do I stay updated on Garden Quest?
questions.answer: Follow the official Garden Quest Discord, the Garden Quest Studio YouTube channel, and the Roblox community for launch news, codes, and updates.
